title: Viral Sample Titration
author: Opentrons
materials: Download your protocol and unzip if needed.

steps.title: For more detailed information on compatible...
steps.instruction: For more detailed information on compatible labware, please visit our [Labware Library](https://labware.opentrons.com/). --- **Note:** The Dilution Plates utilize the Corning 96 Well Round Bottom 1mL and the Analysis Dishes utilize the Corning 96-well Flat Clear Bottom Black Polystyrene TC-treated Microplate. **Labware Type** * Dilution Plate: Corning 96 Well Round Bottom 1mL * Analysis Dish: Corning 96-well Flat Clear Bottom Black Polystyrene TC-treated Microplate * Samples: NEST 96 Well Plate 100uL PCR Full Skirt * Media Reservoir: NEST 1 Well 195mL Reservoir **Protocol Steps**

steps.title: Transfer appropriate volumes of media from...
steps.instruction: Transfer appropriate volumes of media from the reservoir to each dilution plate on a per column basis using the multichannel pipette.

steps.title: Upload your custom labware to the...
steps.instruction: Upload your custom labware to the OT App by navigating to `More` > `Custom Labware` > `Add Labware`, and selecting your labware files (.json extensions) if needed.

steps.title: Upload your protocol file (
steps.instruction: Upload your protocol file (.py extension) to the OT App in the `Protocol` tab.

steps.title: Set up your deck according to the deck map
steps.instruction: Set up your deck according to the deck map.

steps.title: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App
steps.instruction: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App. For calibration tips, check out our support articles.
